summary: Smallest healthy fix follow-through is closed for the external-report lifecycle slice: the downstream refresh sequence is now a dedicated Make target and current archive candidates have been converged.

observations.problem: The strict external report manifest no longer depends on hidden historical EXTERNAL_REPORT_BASIS_ZIP_* defaults. Make now separates advisory review-basis overrides (EXTERNAL_REPORT_REVIEW_BASIS_ZIP_*) from the effective strict binding inputs so strict and batch manifests both bind the same current LLMwiki-source.zip unless an operator explicitly overrides the review basis.
observations.why_it_matters: This closes the silent provenance regression path and keeps the active narrative/reference manifest aligned with the sealed distribution by default.
observations.automation_candidate: Implemented in the Makefile strict-manifest wiring and guarded by tests/test_makefile_static_gates.py.
observations.suggested_followup: Keep the strict-vs-batch ZIP identity assertions in the Makefile static gate suite when future release manifest wiring changes.

observations.surface: external report lifecycle artifacts, generated artifact inventory, release closeout summaries/cohorts
observations.problem: This task manually refreshed readiness, action matrix, release smoke, and generated artifact inventory after the external-report lifecycle and release-gate fixes, but there is still no narrow lifecycle-only target that converges downstream inventory/currentness/closeout surfaces in dependency order.
observations.why_it_matters: Future report-lifecycle-only maintenance can still leave dependent release evidence stale unless the maintainer remembers the refresh sequence by hand.
observations.automation_candidate: Implemented as make external-report-lifecycle-refresh with static Makefile coverage in tests/test_makefile_static_gates.py.
observations.suggested_followup: Closed in this task: make external-report-lifecycle-refresh now refreshes the reference manifest, action matrix, generated artifact index, freshness report, release closeout summary, release evidence cohort, and dashboard after active/archive report moves. The 2026-05-12 integrated report and 2026-05-13 P2 plan were archived, and generated-artifact-index now reports archive_candidate_count=0.
